package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerGarbageCollectionCleanupTickerNotStoppedOnExit() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_ticker_not_stopped_on_exit"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag time.Ticker creation without a visible Stop path in services or workers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
